description: Demo fixture — synthetic posts for @balajis keyed to Soofi's property/web3 corpus.

posts.header: On-chain property records will reshape real estate
posts.text: County deed systems are siloed and opaque. Putting verifiable ownership and liens on-chain would make property data composable. The question is privacy: how do you prove ownership without doxxing the owner?

posts.header: Quoting a thread on stealth addresses
posts.text: This is the right framing. Stealth addresses + ZK proofs are how you separate digital identity from physical identity for tokenized assets.

referencedOriginal.text: How do privacy-preserving property ledgers actually keep wallet-to-person links private while staying verifiable?
